No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to poverty eradication or its targets.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to hunger, food security, or nutrition.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course explicitly teaches 'expressing physical discomfort,' a basic communication skill essential for accessing health services, aligning with Target 3.8.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides tertiary education (Target 4.3). It also fosters cultural understanding and global mobility, aligning with Target 4.7.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to climate change, its impacts, or mitigation/adaptation strategies.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to marine ecosystems, ocean health, or aquatic resources.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, or land degradation.
